questions.text: If the 10-digit number $5432y1749x$ is exactly divisible by 72, then what is the value of $(5x - 4y)$?
If $a^3 - b^3 = 2349$ and $a - b = 9$, then what is the value of $(a+b)^2 - ab$?
If $5\sin\theta = 4$ and $0^\circ < \theta < 90^\circ$, find the value of $\frac{\sec\theta + 4\cot\theta}{4\tan\theta - 5\cos\theta}$.
In $\triangle ABC$, $AB = 7\text{ cm}$, $BC = 10\text{ cm}$, and $AC = 8\text{ cm}$. If $AD$ is the angle bisector of $\angle BAC$, where $D$ is a point on $BC$, find the length of $DC$.
A shopkeeper allows a 25% discount on the marked price of an article and still makes a profit of 20%. If he gains Rs. 40 on the sale of one article, what is the marked price of the article?
A and B can do a piece of work in 15 days and 20 days respectively. They began the work together but A left after 4 days. In how many days will B complete the remaining work?

A train 240 m long crosses a stationary pole in 16 seconds. It crosses another train of length 260 m running in the opposite direction on a parallel track in 12 seconds. Find the speed of the second train.
The simple interest on a certain sum of money for 3 years at 8% per annum is half the compound interest earned on Rs. 4000 for 2 years at 10% per annum. Find the sum placed on simple interest.
The base of a right prism is an equilateral triangle with a side of $8\text{ cm}$ and its height is $10\text{ cm}$. Find its volume.

The average weight of 15 boys in a group is $45\text{ kg}$. When one boy leaves the group, the average weight of the remaining boys increases by $0.5\text{ kg}$. What is the weight of the boy who left?

A container contains a mixture of two liquids A and B in the proportion 7:5. When 9 liters of the mixture is drawn off and the container is completely filled with liquid B, the proportion of A and B becomes 7:9. How many liters of liquid A were in the container initially?

In an election between two candidates, Ravi and Mohan, 10% of the voters did not cast their vote. 5% of the cast votes were found invalid. Ravi secured 55% of the valid votes and won by a majority of 1710 votes. Find the total number of voters enrolled in the voting list.
If $x = 3 + 2\sqrt{2}$, find the value of $\frac{x^6 + x^4 + x^2 + 1}{x^3}$.
In a circle with center O, $PA$ and $PB$ are tangents drawn from an external point P. If $\angle APB = 42^\circ$, find the measure of $\angle OAB$.
Simplify the expression: $3 \times 7 + [6^2 - (8 \div 2 \times 3 + 4)]$.

An observer standing on the top of a lighthouse 120 m above sea level observes that the angle of depression of a ship sailing directly towards it changes from $30^\circ$ to $45^\circ$. Find the distance traveled by the ship during this period. (Take $\sqrt{3} = 1.732$)
Four years ago, the ratio of the ages of P and Q was 5:8. The ratio of their present ages is 2:3. What will be Q's age 5 years from now?

Two pipes A and B can fill a tank in 12 minutes and 15 minutes respectively. If both pipes are opened together and after 4 minutes pipe A is closed, how much more time will pipe B take to fill the remaining tank?
What is the unit digit of the product $433^{24} \times 377^{38} \times 166^{54}$?

A wire when bent in the form of a square encloses an area of $484\text{ cm}^2$. What will be the enclosed area when the same wire is straightened and bent into the form of a circle? (Take $\pi = 22/7$)

A shopkeeper marks up his goods by 30% and then gives a discount of 10%. However, he uses a faulty balance that reads $1000\text{ g}$ for every $800\text{ g}$ of goods. Find his overall profit percentage.
If $a + b + c = 0$, what is the value of $\frac{a^2}{bc} + \frac{b^2}{ca} + \frac{c^2}{ab}$?
If $\cos A + \cos^2 A = 1$, find the value of $\sin^2 A + \sin^4 A$.

Consider the following statements regarding the properties of integers:
1. The product of any three consecutive integers is always divisible by 6.
2. The sum of the cubes of any three consecutive integers is always divisible by 9.
3. The difference between the squares of any two consecutive odd integers is always divisible by 16.

Which of the above statements is/are correct?
A vessel contains 80 liters of pure milk. 8 liters of milk is taken out and replaced by water. This process is repeated two more times. What is the amount of milk left in the vessel?
